backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, exposing query/update endpoints for bot control, config management, and grid state, plus a recurring timer-driven trading loop.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features — adding a useOpenOrders React Query hook and creating an OpenOrdersPanel component — to their target files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, footer, and a responsive grid containing BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, GridPreviewTable, and OpenOrdersPanel.
React component card that displays bot running/stopped status with an animated indicator and provides Start/Stop buttons wired to useStartBot and useStopBot mutations with error handling.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React component card with a controlled form for editing intervalSeconds, spreadBps, and numOrders, including client-side validation and a Save button that calls the setConfig mutation with success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sortable table of the bot's last computed grid orders (buys and sells), with loading skeletons, empty state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair fetched from the backend, with a refresh button, loading skeleton, and bot status context.
Renders the list of currently open orders on the exchange, separated into buy/sell counts, with error handling, loading skeletons, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor/identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity state) via a React context and AuthClient, with delegation validity checks and idle handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend canister calls (bot status, config, mid price, grid, open orders) and mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config, polling every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports JetBrains Mono and Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a terminal-inspired dark color theme using OKLCH CSS variables for both light and dark modes, including custom utility classes for buy/sell/neutral states and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (buy, sell, neutral, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom border radii, terminal-style box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 15) describing a Motoko-based ICP/ckUSDT trading bot on ICDex, documenting current features, architectural notes, known issues (budget_exceeded on smart grid repositioning), and the next planned step of fetching open orders from ICDex for dashboard display.
